data.title: Oiles Lifts Full-Year Profit Forecast Despite Extraordinary Loss from Seismic Equipment Delays
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Oiles ( (JP:6282) ) has shared an update.

Oiles Corporation has announced that it will book both extraordinary income and losses in its results for the fiscal year ending March 31, 2026, following the restoration of performance-testing equipment for seismic isolators at its Ashikaga Plant and resulting delivery delays. The company expects an extraordinary loss of JPY 1,396 million for compensation related to those delays, partly offset by an extraordinary gain of JPY 1,136 million from selling two listed equity holdings as part of a policy to enhance asset efficiency.

Reflecting the structural devices division’s latest outlook and these one-off items, Oiles has raised its full-year consolidated earnings forecast, now projecting slightly higher net sales and a notable uplift in operating, ordinary, and net profit compared with its February guidance. The revised forecast implies profit attributable to owners of parent of JPY 4,700 million, up 14.6% versus the previous estimate, signaling resilient performance despite compensation costs and a more streamlined balance sheet for stakeholders.

More about Oiles

Oiles Corporation is a Japanese manufacturer specializing in structural devices such as seismic isolators and related industrial components, serving infrastructure and construction markets that require vibration control and safety. Listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange Prime Market under securities code 6282, the company also manages a portfolio of investment securities that it is gradually optimizing to improve asset efficiency.

Average Trading Volume: 108,710

Current Market Cap: Yen74.36B

Learn more about 6282 stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Geopolitical Tensions with Iran Threaten Tilray’s European Margins Through Higher Energy and Fuel Costs
data.description:
Tilray (TLRY) has disclosed a new risk, in the Economy & Political Environment category.

End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Geopolitical instability involving Iran is likely to keep European fuel and energy markets volatile, driving higher costs that could weigh on Tilray’s operations and profitability. Elevated prices for transportation, utilities, and other energy-intensive activities, such as brewing and cannabis cultivation, may compress margins and strain its European supply chain.

As the duration and potential escalation of the conflict remain uncertain, Tilray faces prolonged exposure to these cost pressures and related operational disruptions in its European businesses. This uncertainty complicates planning, increases the risk of earnings variability, and may limit the company’s ability to offset rising expenses through pricing or efficiency measures.

Overall, Wall Street has a Moderate Buy consensus rating on TLRY stock based on 2 Buys and 4 Holds.

data.title: Satin Finserv Posts Transformational FY26 With Rapid Growth and Capital Boost
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Satin Creditcare Network Ltd ( (IN:SATIN) ) just unveiled an update.

Satin Finserv Limited, the wholly owned subsidiary of Satin Creditcare Network Ltd, reported a transformational FY26 marked by strong growth in assets and disbursements alongside significant operational expansion. The company crossed Rs 1,000 crore in assets under management, reflecting about 93% year-on-year growth, while disbursements exceeded Rs 700 crore, rising roughly 120% year-on-year, aided by a newly introduced sustainability-focused business vertical.

To support this rapid scale-up, Satin Finserv strengthened its capital structure by raising around Rs 730 crore in debt, including its first external commercial borrowing and multiple NCD issuances, and securing Rs 90 crore in equity infusion from its parent. The lender also expanded its physical footprint by adding more than 70 branches to reach 121 touchpoints and grew its workforce to over 1,200 employees, positioning it for calibrated, risk-conscious growth and reinforcing its long-term value proposition for stakeholders in India’s under-served MSME segment.

More about Satin Creditcare Network Ltd

Satin Creditcare Network Ltd operates in the financial services industry, focusing on microfinance and lending solutions to underserved segments, primarily micro, small and medium enterprises in India. Through its wholly owned subsidiary Satin Finserv Limited, the group is building a customer-centric lending franchise aimed at expanding access to credit across regions and strengthening its position in the MSME ecosystem.

Average Trading Volume: 4,983

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: 16.2B INR

data.title: Lundin Gold Seals Silver Stream Deal and Plans LunR Share Dividend
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An announcement from Lundin Gold ( (TSE:LUG) ) is now available.

Lundin Gold has signed a definitive silver stream agreement with Canada-based LunR Royalties, under which LunR will receive a life-of-mine silver stream from the Fruta del Norte gold mine in exchange for 50,505,051 LunR common shares. The transaction, expected to close in the second quarter of 2026 subject to customary approvals, formalizes terms announced in February and deepens Lundin Gold’s use of streaming structures to unlock value from byproduct metals.

Following closing, Lundin Gold plans to distribute all LunR shares it receives to its own shareholders as a dividend in kind, leaving the company with no ongoing equity interest in LunR. Shareholders in jurisdictions where securities laws restrict such a distribution, including the United States, will instead receive cash proceeds from the sale of the LunR shares allocated to them, a structure that broadens potential value realization for investors while ensuring regulatory compliance across markets.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:LUG) stock is a Buy with a C$108.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Lundin Gold stock, see the TSE:LUG Stock Forecast page.

More about Lundin Gold

Lundin Gold Inc., headquartered in Vancouver, operates the high-grade Fruta del Norte gold mine in southeast Ecuador, one of the world’s highest-grade operating gold assets. The company focuses on responsible, transparent operations aligned with international best practices while pursuing ongoing exploration of its extensive land package to support long-term growth and create economic, social and environmental value for stakeholders.

Average Trading Volume: 667,355

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$26.59B

data.description:

Iyogin Holdings,Inc. ( (JP:5830) ) has shared an announcement.

Iyogin Holdings has been repurchasing its own common shares on the Tokyo Stock Exchange under a board-approved buyback program, acquiring 1,337,300 shares for about ¥4.0 billion between March 1 and March 31, 2026. Under the broader authorization running from February 12 to April 17, 2026, the company has cumulatively bought 2,141,500 shares for approximately ¥6.75 billion, signaling an active capital policy that may support shareholder value and optimize its capital structure.

The current authorization allows purchases of up to 5,000,000 shares or ¥10 billion, indicating further potential buybacks depending on market conditions and management’s assessment of capital needs. By actively using share repurchases, Iyogin Holdings underscores confidence in its financial position and earnings outlook, which could enhance earnings per share and influence investor perception of the stock within Japan’s regional banking sector.

The most recent analyst rating on (JP:5830) stock is a Buy with a Yen3220.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Iyogin Holdings,Inc. stock, see the JP:5830 Stock Forecast page.

Iyogin Holdings, Inc. is a Japanese financial group listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange Prime Market, operating primarily through banking and related financial services. data.title: Leocor Mining Doubles Stake in Intrepid Metals to Over 15%
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An announcement from Leocor Gold ( (TSE:LECR) ) is now available.

Leocor Mining Inc. has significantly increased its equity position in Intrepid Metals Corp. by exercising 8,823,529 warrants, doubling its holdings to 17,647,058 common shares and raising its ownership from about 8.17 per cent to 15.09 per cent. The move, which leaves Leocor with no remaining Intrepid warrants or other convertible securities, underscores its strategic investment stance in the Arizona-focused base metals explorer, following Teck’s recent 14.7 per cent equity stake in Intrepid and potentially aligning Leocor more closely with an emerging high-grade copper, silver and zinc district.

Intrepid Metals’ portfolio is anchored by the advanced Corral copper project in southeastern Arizona, supported by the Tombstone South and Mesa Well projects in established mining jurisdictions. Leocor’s increased stake signals confidence in Intrepid’s technical team and its North American growth prospects, while giving Leocor added exposure to base metals alongside its core precious metals exploration focus in Canada.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:LECR) stock is a Hold with a C$0.08 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Leocor Gold stock, see the TSE:LECR Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on LECR Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, LECR is a Neutral.

The score is primarily held back by weak financial performance (no revenue, ongoing losses, and persistent negative operating/free cash flow alongside a shrinking equity base). Technicals are moderately supportive due to the price trading above key moving averages, but mixed momentum indicators limit conviction. Valuation provides limited support because the very low P/E is not meaningful for a pre-revenue, cash-burning company and there is no dividend.

To see Spark’s full report on LECR stock, click here.

More about Leocor Gold

Leocor Mining Inc. is a British Columbia-based resource company focused on the acquisition and exploration of precious metal projects, with a current emphasis on Atlantic Canada. Through ownership and earn-in agreements, it controls several gold-copper assets in the Baie Verte Mining District, including the Dorset, Dorset Extension, Copper Creek and Five Mile Brook projects, forming a contiguous 2,000-hectare exploration corridor.

data.title: Air Water Reshapes Nomination and Remuneration Committee to Strengthen Governance
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Air Water ( (JP:4088) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Air Water Inc. has reshaped the composition of its Nomination and Remuneration Committee, an advisory body to the Board of Directors, effective April 3, 2026. Representative Director, President, CEO and COO Ryosuke Matsubayashi has stepped down from the committee, with the body now comprised of Independent Director Yuko Haga as chair, Independent Director Takao Matsui, and Outside Corporate Auditor Atsushi Hayashi.

The governance change follows measures the company has been implementing to prevent a recurrence of past inappropriate accounting practices. By limiting the committee to independent and outside members, Air Water aims to strengthen the fairness, objectivity, and transparency of director nominations and remuneration decisions, signaling a reinforced focus on governance and accountability to stakeholders.

The most recent analyst rating on (JP:4088) stock is a Hold with a Yen2211.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Air Water stock, see the JP:4088 Stock Forecast page.

More about Air Water

Air Water Inc. is a Japan-based industrial group listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange Prime Market and the Sapporo Stock Exchange. The company operates across industrial gases and related businesses, supplying essential products and services to manufacturing and other sectors in Japan and abroad.

data.title: Air Water Unveils Detailed Governance and Culture Reforms After Accounting Probe
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An announcement from Air Water ( (JP:4088) ) is now available.

Air Water Inc. has formally adopted a detailed set of recurrence prevention measures after an independent Special Investigating Committee found inappropriate accounting practices within the group and confirmed partial involvement of top management. The board, guided by a Management Reform Committee, has positioned these steps as its top priority to restore transparency, sound governance, and social trust.

The program centers on four pillars: reforming corporate culture to emphasize compliance and reduce excessive performance pressure, strengthening governance through a more effective board, audit body, and nomination and remuneration functions, and rebuilding management infrastructure and internal controls, including new finance-focused executives and enhanced accounting oversight. These reforms aim to reinforce group-wide internal controls and auditing, signaling a broad cleanup effort that could reshape how the company is managed and perceived by investors and other stakeholders.

The most recent analyst rating on (JP:4088) stock is a Hold with a Yen2211.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Air Water stock, see the JP:4088 Stock Forecast page.

More about Air Water

Air Water Inc. is a Japan-based industrial group listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange Prime Market and the Sapporo Stock Exchange. The company operates across multiple businesses with a core in industrial gases and related services, serving a broad base of industrial and commercial customers in Japan and overseas.

data.title: Madoro Metals Advances Reverse Takeover Process With Narrow River Resources
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Madoro Metals Corp ( (TSE:MDM) ) has shared an update.

Madoro Metals Corp. and Narrow River Resources are advancing a proposed reverse takeover that would constitute a change of business under TSX Venture Exchange rules, aiming to combine their lithium and mineral assets. The parties are finalizing required documentation, including a technical report for NRR’s Lac Simard project, while working toward regulatory and shareholder approvals and emphasizing their commitment to closing the transaction.

As part of the process, the companies have completed a combined airborne magnetic survey over Madoro’s First Green Lithium project and NRR’s adjacent Lac Simard property in Quebec. This technical and transactional progress suggests a strategic effort to consolidate lithium-focused exploration assets, potentially strengthening the combined entity’s position in the emerging Decelles lithium camp subject to successful completion of all conditions.

More about Madoro Metals Corp

Madoro Metals Corp. is an emerging resource exploration company focused on evaluating, acquiring, and exploring mineral properties in Canada and Mexico. Its portfolio includes an option to acquire 100% of the First Green Lithium Property in Quebec’s Decelles lithium camp, a 50% interest in the Ralleau mineral property in Quebec’s Urban Barry District, and a 100% interest in the Cerro Minas Property in Oaxaca, Mexico.

Average Trading Volume: 186,934

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$4.55M
